label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five team members: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts in a specific position. The problem is about tracking their position swaps step by step. I need to figure out where Bob ends up after all the swaps. First, let me list out the initial positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So initially, Dave is a cheerleader and Bob is a right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes cheerleader. So after first swap: - Alice: right winger (unchanged) - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger (unchanged) - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper (unchanged) Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Now, Dave is right midfielder and Eve is goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes right midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Third swap: Alice
